description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized blue Toyota SUV with a robust and angular body design, featuring a prominent front grille and integrated headlights. The vehicle has four passenger doors and a rear hatch, with black roof rails and side steps for added utility. The windows are tinted dark, and the side mirrors are color-matched to the body. The wheels are black with a multi-spoke design, giving the SUV a sporty and rugged appearance. The rear of the vehicle includes a subtle spoiler and a large rear window, with the Toyota badge visible. The overall build suggests a vehicle designed for both urban and off-road environments, with a high ground clearance and durable exterior materials.
description: A blue Toyota SUV with four doors, black roof rails, and sporty black multi-spoke wheels. It features a bold front grille, tinted windows, and a rugged, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, integrated headlights, and the Toyota badge.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, black roof rails, side steps, and black multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large rear window, subtle spoiler, and Toyota badge.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, roof rails, and sporty wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: black multi-spoke rims with a solid, sporty pattern
